description: Theft. Whosoever commits theft shall be punished with imprisonment. Mapped from IPC Section 379 to BNS Section 303.
justification: Dishonest removal of movable property from the possession of a person without consent.

description: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property. Mapped from IPC Section 420 to BNS Section 318.
justification: Dishonest inducement leading to the transfer of money or property under false representations.

description: Punishment for murder. Mapped from IPC Section 302 to BNS Section 103.
justification: Causing death with the intention of causing death or bodily injury likely to cause death.

description: Attempt to murder. Mapped from IPC Section 307 to BNS Section 109.
justification: Doing an act with such intention or knowledge that if it caused death, the offender would be guilty of murder.

description: Punishment for criminal trespass. Mapped from IPC Section 447 to BNS Section 329.
justification: Entering onto property in the possession of another with intent to commit an offense or intimidate.

description: Punishment for criminal breach of trust. Mapped from IPC Section 406 to BNS Section 316.
justification: Dishonest misappropriation of property entrusted to a person's custody or care.

description: Punishment for criminal intimidation. Mapped from IPC Section 506 to BNS Section 351.
justification: Threatening a person with injury to their person, reputation, or property to cause alarm.

description: Punishment for voluntarily causing hurt. Mapped from IPC Section 323 to BNS Section 115.
justification: Doing any act with the intention of causing hurt to any person, causing bodily pain, disease, or infirmity.

description: Assault or criminal force to woman with intent to outrage her modesty. Mapped from IPC Section 354 to BNS Section 74.
justification: Assaulting or using criminal force against a woman intending to outrage or knowing it is likely to outrage her modesty.

description: Husband or relative of husband of a woman subjecting her to cruelty. Mapped from IPC Section 498A to BNS Section 85.
justification: Subjecting a married woman to willful conduct of such nature as is likely to drive her to suicide or cause grave injury.
